items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
ENVELOPE#Small Grain Embossed Quilted Leather Envelope Bag
Classic is eternal, stunning V-pattern combined with a quilted caviar texture. Italian ZP original cowhide paired with a striking YSL logo, combining atmosphere and fashion! In hand and it's ZP! Definitely take it to the counter to compare with the real thing!
Authentic...
Don't waste money! Buying from us is enough!
Model: 1754
Dimensions: 21x13x6cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Super practical small bag. Caviar calfskin, remove the strap to use directly as a handbag. Another bestseller, exuding charm inside and out. The bag is equipped with 16 card slots, can hold however many cards ✨Exquisite craftsmanship 😖Quality worthy of the price. Model=26801 Dimensions 22.5x14x4cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Latest boutique Becky quilted double-zip clutch, crafted from premium lambskin with a delicate texture. Features a classic quilted pattern and a minimalist logo, elegant and versatile! Double-zip design for easy organization. Lightweight with ample space for various phone models. Includes 4 card slots: one for the phone, one for cards and essentials. No need for a separate card holder!
Size: 19x11x5cm
Model: 608941

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【New Arrivals】
The latest LOU BELT BAG from the boutique, featuring an adjustable waist bag design. Only one size available. Made of 100% calfskin, it has one interior pocket, three card slots, and one zippered exterior pocket! It is not just a waist bag; it can also be worn as a chest bag or crossbody. Easily fits an iPhone Plus! Very practical and convenient!
Model: 534817.jd
Dimensions: 17x12.5x5.5cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【New Arrivals】2020 IT BAG_ The must-have hot model. It conquered the entire fashion circle before it even launched! Inspired by the Rue De Solferino street name in Paris! The bag uses imported Italian fine quill grain Box calfskin, with excellent hand feel and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top and bottom half-open buckle completely subverts your perception of bag buckles, making you exclaim that bags can be opened this way, simply too interesting! Model: 634306 Dimensions: 19x13x5cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Is YSL now pursuing a dual approach? Not only have they launched a super huge tote bag, but also a cute mini round bag to meet the needs of different people! The new SADE mini round tube handbag may be small, but it is not a useless little bag. Tested to easily hold a mobile phone and daily small items. Stylish and practical! The entire bag features a diamond quilting pattern paired with the classic YSL mini logo. It is incredibly exquisite! Made of original lambskin leather with a soft and comfortable texture, paired with a short shoulder strap, it is cute beyond imagination! Model: 699703 Size: 20x10x10cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
New Cloud-shaped underarm chain bag has arrived! It has a unique curved shape that fits the underarm curve perfectly, making it super comfortable to use! Made from soft, wrinkled original cowhide, it has a unique look and a high-quality texture! The bag is very light overall, adding no burden to use. Just pick it up and go! The overall design is retro and elegant, and the opening features a one-piece molded hardware hinge design for greater convenience in daily use!
Model: 681632
Size: 24x14x2cm

🔥【Original Quality】
LOULOU PUFFER Quilted Lambskin Bag, made of 100% lambskin, soft and delicate to the touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; featuring YSL metal logo, matte finish, and unique silver brushed metal hardware; satin lining, magnetic closure, one zippered interior pocket. Size: 29x17x11cm
Model: 577476
